description: Purchased at Logan Airport in Boston because I didn't have any Boston souvenirs from the trip.
Custom design by Tracy Sayre, based on an office in-joke. One of a pair.
The crystal fox, a science fiction animal introduced in Star Wars: The Last Jedi.
Purchased at DRI concert at Fitzgerald's in Houston, during their 2014 tour. Album art from Crossover on the front.
Triangular Irregular Network (TIN) map of Mont Blanc in France. Purchased in Chamonix.
1980s skateboard graphic from the original Natas Kaupas deck from Santa Monica Airlines.
Mario and Yoshi from the 1991 Super Nintendo game Super Mario World.
307 is the telephone area code for the entire state of Wyoming. Purchased at Devil's Tower National Monument.
